title: deparia marginalis
intro: Deparia marginalis, also known as the marginal spleenwort, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It is native to East Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in various cultures. In herbal preparations, Deparia marginalis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its uses and availability may vary depending on the region and local regulations.
